eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 06:33 PM ON MAY 7, 2026 Effective until 09:33 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Child Abduction from Keithville, Louisiana, last believed to be near Allen, Texas. Suspect vehicle is a white Chevrolet Suburban with Texas license plate V M L 6 0 6 1. Missing child is Merlin  Argueta, 13 years old Hispanic female. Suspect is Daniel Mejia 18 year old Hispanic male. Call Caddo Parish Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1.
